_comment: Setup: run `npm install` in ./mcp-servers/ before first use.
Default VAULT_PATH/PROJECT_PATH use ${workspaceFolder} so MCP works when the IDE spawns the process without your shell env. Override in mcp-servers/.env (gitignored) if your vault lives elsewhere.
Use ${workspaceFolder}/mcp-servers/... absolute paths in args; Cursor resolves ./ against the repo root, not cwd.
Run ts-node via node (not npx) to avoid npm EOVERRIDE on root overrides.
